example_cases.description: Feature mode spec reads existing codebase for interface conflict avoidance
example_cases.input: mode=feature, profile L1 with existing module interfaces
example_cases.expected_output: Spec module designs reference existing interfaces, new interfaces do not collide with existing names
example_cases.setup: Profile with L1 architecture layer containing module and interface definitions

example_cases.description: Critic performs impact audit in feature mode
example_cases.input: mode=feature, spec artifact modifying existing module's interface
example_cases.expected_output: spec_review.json contains impact_audit section with touchedModules, changedInterfaces, dependencyDirectionChanges
example_cases.setup: Profile L1 with modules, feature spec touching one module

example_cases.description: Impact audit flags breaking interface change as block
example_cases.input: Feature spec removes a field from an existing interface
example_cases.setup: Profile L1 with interface, feature spec changing that interface incompatibly

example_cases.description: Impact audit results written to feature-scoped spec_review.json

property_cases.property: When mode=greenfield, Critic performs standard review without impact audit — no profile L1 reading, no touchedModules output
